title: anarthrophyllum umbellatum
intro: Anarthrophyllum umbellatum, also known as the Kaka-beak, is a shrub native to New Zealand with its unique umbrella-shaped flowers. The medicinal properties of Anarthrophyllum umbellatum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are derived from its leaves and stems. The health benefits of Anarthrophyllum umbellatum include treating skin irritations, wounds, and minor infections, as well as reducing fever and inflammation. Anarthrophyllum umbellatum can be prepared as a tea, infused oil, or salve for its medicinal and health benefits.
